name: umsgpack
documentation:
If you are looking for the unicode wrapper around msgpack, that's msgpacku. If you are looking for the umsgpack module, that's u-msgpack-python.

Sorry for the confusion!

modules.name: umsgpack
documentation:
Wrap msgpack in more Python 3-friendly defaults for text

ensures binary and text types are kept separate

functions.name: umsgpack.packb
documentation: wrap msgpack.packb, setting use_bin_type=True by default

functions.name: umsgpack.unpackb
documentation: wrap msgpack.unpackb, setting encoding='utf8' by default
